recommendations.title: Fahim
recommendations.overview: Fahim Mohammad, a Bangladeshi immigrant, becomes a world junior chess champion in France.

recommendations.title: Serial Teachers 2
recommendations.overview: The worst teachers of France landed in England for an ultra-secret mission. With Boulard, the King of the Dunces, they are parachuted in the best school of the country, and they will apply their famous methods on the future of the nation.

recommendations.title: Gaston Lagaffe

recommendations.title: Ugly Melanie
recommendations.overview: This is the story of too nice girl who one day decides to become evil. And who will find out it is not so easy to do wrong when you have always been nice.

recommendations.title: Serial Teachers

recommendations.title: In the Name of the Land
recommendations.overview: Pierre is 25 when he returns from Wyoming to his fiancée and take over the family farm. Twenty years later, the farm expanded and so did the family. It's the time of happy days, at least at the beginning. The debts accumulate and Pierre is exhausted

recommendations.title: Mr. Stein Goes Online

recommendations.title: Paris-Manhattan
recommendations.overview: Alice, an obsessed Woody Allen fan, meets Pierre in a night-club and falls in love with him. But when Pierre sees Alice's sister Hélène, things start to get complicated.

recommendations.title: The Dinner Game

recommendations.title: The Soft Skin
recommendations.overview: Pierre Lachenay is a well-known publisher and lecturer, married to Franca and father of Sabine. He starts a love affair with air hostess Nicole, which Pierre is hiding, but he cannot stay away from her.
